preconditions: Launch the WashTab SPA in a browser
User is unauthenticated and has not signed in
Home page loads in guest state

testCases.title: Verify Home page loads successfully in guest state for an unauthenticated user
steps: Launch the application in a new browser session
Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Wait for the Home page guest state to finish loading
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page loads successfully in guest state while the user remains unauthenticated and the approved guest-state controls are available on the shared Home page.

testCases.title: Verify all approved guest-state buttons and shared Home shell controls are visible and enabled on Home page
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Observe the Home page in guest state
Verify the Person/Profile button is visible and enabled
Verify the Back button is visible and enabled
Verify the Notification button is visible and enabled
Verify the Home button is visible and enabled
Verify the Customer signup button is visible and enabled
Verify the Clean survey button is visible and enabled
Verify the Site survey button is visible and enabled
testCases.expectedResult: All approved guest-state controls and shared Home shell controls are visible, enabled, and actionable on the Home page guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Person/Profile button navigates from Home guest state to Login page or Login view
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Verify the Home page is displayed in guest state
Select the Person/Profile button once
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home guest state to the Login page or Login view while maintaining unauthenticated state.

testCases.title: Verify Customer signup button navigates from Home guest state to customer-search page
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Verify the Home page guest state is visible
Select the Customer signup button
testCases.expectedResult: The customer-search page opens from the Home guest state and the session remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify Clean survey button navigates from Home guest state to vehicle-survey page
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Verify the Home page guest state is visible
Select the Clean survey button
testCases.expectedResult: The vehicle-survey page opens from the Home guest state and the session remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify Site survey button navigates from Home guest state to survey page
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Verify the Home page guest state is visible
Select the Site survey button
testCases.expectedResult: The survey page opens from the Home guest state and the session remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify navigation back to Home guest state after opening Login view from Person/Profile button
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Select the Person/Profile button to open the Login page or Login view
Use browser back navigation or approved application navigation to return to the Home page
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page guest state and the approved guest-state controls remain visible and enabled without authenticating the user.

testCases.title: Verify navigation back to Home guest state after opening customer-search page
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Select the Customer signup button
Use browser back navigation or approved application navigation to return to the Home page
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page guest state and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify navigation back to Home guest state after opening vehicle-survey page
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Select the Clean survey button
Use browser back navigation or approved application navigation to return to the Home page
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page guest state and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify navigation back to Home guest state after opening survey page
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Select the Site survey button
Use browser back navigation or approved application navigation to return to the Home page
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page guest state and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify repeated clicking of Person/Profile button does not create broken navigation state
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Rapidly click the Person/Profile button multiple times before navigation completes
testCases.expectedResult: Only the Login page or Login view is opened and the application does not display duplicate overlays, broken rendering, or inconsistent navigation behavior.

testCases.title: Verify Home button remains visible and enabled throughout guest-state workflow navigation
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Verify the Home button is visible and enabled in guest state
Navigate to the Login page or Login view using the Person/Profile button
Return to the Home page guest state
Verify the Home button remains visible and enabled
testCases.expectedResult: The Home button remains consistently visible and enabled during guest-state navigation flows.

testCases.title: Verify Notification button remains visible and enabled throughout guest-state workflow
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Verify the Notification button is visible and enabled
Navigate to one guest-accessible destination and return to the Home page
Verify the Notification button remains visible and enabled
testCases.expectedResult: The Notification button remains visible and enabled throughout guest-state navigation without exposing authenticated-only functionality.

testCases.title: Verify Back button remains visible and enabled throughout guest-state workflow
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Verify the Back button is visible and enabled
Navigate to one guest-accessible destination and return to the Home page
Verify the Back button remains visible and enabled
testCases.expectedResult: The Back button remains visible and enabled throughout guest-state navigation without changing the user authentication state.
